title.en: For Ye Tian, this organization is good.

content.en:
"Endless Ancestor, I would like to invite you to join the Tower of Doom. "

The Six Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse True Martial Origin Ancestor invited.

True Martial Origin Ancestor is one of the Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realms that Ye Tian has befriended, and the Tower of Doom is not a force in the Maple Leaf Territory, but an organization that spans multiple space-time territories.

This organization does not have an eternal realm, it should be said that once a half-step of the eternal realm breaks through to the eternal realm, it will automatically withdraw from the Tower of Doom.

Because the Tower of Doom is an idle organization seeking to break through to the Eternal Realm, it can also be said to be a mutual aid organization, and the ultimate goal is to become the Eternal Realm.

Therefore, once you break through to the Eternal Realm, you must break away from the Tower of Doom, otherwise, the nature of the Tower of Doom will change.

In fact, there is another reason, that is, the powerhouses of the Eight Extremes Realm of the Tower of Doom Half-Step Eternal Realm also don't want an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm to step on their heads and lead them all of a sudden after breaking through to the Eternal Realm.

For Ye Tian, this organization is good.

So, Ye Tian agreed to join the Tower of Doom.

this day.

True Martial Origin Ancestor took Ye Tian to the branch of the Tower of Doom in the Maple Leaf Territory.

Here, Ye Tian saw a lot of half-step Eternal Realms at the Extreme Realm level.

After all, for many half-step Eternal Realms, the Tower of Doom's organizational model is still very appealing to them, and it doesn't cost anything.

The Tower of Doom does not have a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse in the Maple Leaf Territory, only a half-step Eternal Realm of the Seven-Pole Realm, and there are quite a few of them, with twenty-three.

Now, Ye Tian has joined the Tower of Doom, even if he has twenty-four Seven-Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses.

"The Tower of Doom alone is far beyond the Origin Sea in the extreme realm of the Maple Leaf Lord's branch!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

It can be seen from this that the Source Sea is really not suitable for half-step Eternal Realm cultivation, but if the Eight Extremes Realm wants to break through to the Nine Extremes Realm, it must also go to the Source Sea.

There is no specific division of positions in the Tower of Doom, and on the surface, everyone's positions are the same, but in private, those seven-pole realm half-step eternal realms still won't pay attention to those ordinary half-step eternal realms, and even the first, second, and third polar realm half-step eternal realm powerhouses are not qualified to communicate with them.

Ye Tian had just joined the Tower of Doom, so naturally he couldn't immediately squeeze into the high-level circle of the Tower of Doom, but he still learned a lot of things through the True Martial Ancestor.

For example, in the Maple Leaf Territory, the strongest of the Tower of Doom is the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Seven Extremes Realm-Fu Ze.

The Seven-Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm is also divided into strong and weak, and Ye Tian belongs to the Seven-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse who has just broken through, while Fu Ze belongs to the top seven-pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse.

After joining the Tower of Doom, he found that the treasure trove of classics of the Tower of Doom also recorded the secret of how to break through to the half-step eternal realm of the Eight Extremes Realm, and he could not obtain such secret information in the Source Sea.

Basically, after the strength reaches the Seven-Extreme Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, it will touch the boundary barrier.

This is also known as the first boundary barrier.

And the barrier between the half-step Eternal Realm of the Eight Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm of the Nine-Pole Realm is called the second boundary barrier.

Both of these barriers are difficult to break, but the second barrier is a hundred times more difficult than the first.

After all, among the countless space-time territories, there are still quite a few half-step Eternal Realms in the Eight Extremes Realm, but the Half-Step Eternal Realms in the Nine Extremes Realm are too rare, and there may not be them in this era.

In order to break the barrier of the first boundary, the secret of the Tower of Doom gives two solutions.

The first plan is to break the barrier of the Eternal Body first, and the half-step Eternal Realm that can be cultivated to the Seven Extremes Realm basically has the Eternal Body, and the Eternal Body has been cultivated to the Consummation Realm.

Perfection is only the limit on the surface, but it is still possible to continue to improve, but it is extremely difficult.

Above perfection is transcendence.

The transcendent eternal body is the realm that breaks the limit, and once the eternal body reaches this realm, it can break the first boundary barrier.

But the premise is that your strength has reached the first boundary barrier.

If it was just an ordinary Seven-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm or a Six-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm, then even if the Eternal Body was raised to the Transcendence Realm, there would be no way to break the first boundary barrier.

The second plan is to comprehend the innate eternal rules to an unimaginable height, and then use the innate eternal rules to forcibly break the first boundary barrier.

However, the second option is more difficult.

Basically, those Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm were all broken through through the first method.

The difference in strength between the Seven-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm and the eight-pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm is very large, even worlds apart.

An eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm can even deal with a hundred seven-pole realm half-step eternal realms by himself, and the top-of-the-line eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm can even fight with the weaker eternal realm.

"The First Boundary Barrier, the Transcendent Eternal!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

At present, he is not able to break the first boundary barrier.

However, if he wants to continue to improve his strength, he can still do it if he wants to improve his strength to the peak of the Seven Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm.

In fact, in the space-time territory, there are many secret techniques to improve will, but most of them are not as strong as the will world.

In addition, the half-step eternal power of the Extreme Realm can continue to be compressed, infinitely close to the true eternal power.

Otherwise, those extreme realms in the space-time territory would not be able to reach the peak level of the seven-pole realm and the half-step eternal realm, let alone attack the first boundary barrier.

And Ye Tian's half-step eternal power has never been compressed, and it has been increased to the combat power of the seven-step Extreme Realm half-step eternal realm, if he says it, I'm afraid no one will believe it.

However, this can't be blamed on Ye Tian for not compressing, in fact, he really doesn't know.

There were indeed a few Seven-Extreme Realms in the Source Sea and a half-step Eternal Realm, but it was impossible for those few to tell him this secret, and those in the Origin God Pavilion didn't know this secret either.

But now it's not too late to know, once his half-step eternal power is successfully compressed, his strength will inevitably increase quickly.

But it is not easy to compress the power of half-step Eternal Power, and the Eternal Compression Secret Technique is required.

Different Eternal Compression Mystics can compress to different degrees.

For example, some Eternal Compression Secret Techniques can only compress five times the power of half a step of Eternity, but the top-notch Eternal Compression Secret Technique can compress a hundred times.

However, the more advanced Eternal Compression Secret Technique is extremely precious, and the Tower of Doom does not have it, unless you add some Eternal Time and Space Territories and pledge allegiance to those Eternal Realms, you can obtain the top Eternal Compression Secret Technique.

The Tower of Doom currently sells eighteen times the Eternal Compression Mystic Technique, and even then it will have to pay some price to obtain.

"Let's first cultivate the Eternal Compression Secret Technique of Eighteen Times Compression!"

Ye Tian decided.
